title: eslint-config-algolia@5.4.0 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [eslint-config-algolia](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-config-algolia) just published its new version 5.4.0.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency eslint-config-algolia
New version 5.4.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As eslint-config-algolia is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 25 commits . - [`a43d4fd`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/a43d4fdecff3c511da62a42975ad38d771cdb67d) release v5.4.0 - [`6f07294`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/6f072949f29eb0f508127ae575767bb433449613) feat(eslint): add new rules since July - [`d40461d`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/d40461d05cf726ee882766b4a9db866524e1fcda) chore(package): fix dependencies, add npmrc - [`ed5e84a`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/ed5e84a59af33f0a21ce1cf57161c7f4b586ccf5) Merge pull request #13 from algolia/greenkeeper-eslint-plugin-react-6.1.2 - [`edd2ec5`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/edd2ec57a08b48d4852cca1000305dc895b7b6ac) chore(package): update eslint-plugin-react to version 6.1.2 - [`f3fc8a5`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/f3fc8a5a77a9f931344ed0b0d7951d3a0e8b7aff) release v5.3.1 - [`6bec583`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/6bec583991c210fd921c4e909cfd1abe9b079fd8) fix(dep): add forgotten dep - [`b8a54cd`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/b8a54cdb6067615abf2a03cb1851eabc6f972550) release v5.3.0 - [`c38dbd1`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/c38dbd141eec67641512c4fa641ebf5b9a37b548) Merge pull request #9 from algolia/feat/Jasmine-Jest - [`333288c`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/333288cc9c340b51cf8bb5483be3659cddb57e4c) feat(Jasmine): provide set of rules for Jasmine tests - [`d304116`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/d3041162990e500c2f8dbb258bf3ddef19fe0def) release v5.2.2 - [`380c437`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/380c437470c22b330d30315a28ff4d5e585ffa06) docs(TOC): fix - [`e2953fe`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/e2953feb2143472a7e9dd4d5f3d5b24f1460c35e) docs(CHANGELOG): desc before doctoc - [`83db95d`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/83db95d9db8b55612139bf27735fb0049846c658) release v5.2.1 - [`39ba5aa`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/39ba5aaa42c90dcdc7de8ea840e8d7a50305532f) chore(release): add missing dependencies There are 25 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/compare/d283010e24008c2302689f84936d81fca504d2ff...a43d4fdecff3c511da62a42975ad38d771cdb67d). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
